description: Content loaded via JavaScript (GTM containers, SPAs, dynamic forms) is invisible to static HTML parsers.
mitigation: Use a real browser (Playwright, Puppeteer) with JavaScript execution.

description: Cookie consent banners (CookieYes, Cookiebot, Complianz, OneTrust) block JavaScript-rendered content until accepted.
mitigation: Auto-accept consent banners before checking for gated content.

description: Absence of detection is not evidence of absence. Binary true/false results from detection tools should never be presented as confirmed absence.
mitigation: Use confidence scoring (high/medium/low/unknown) instead of binary results.

description: Checking only the homepage or a single page produces systematically incomplete results. Email forms, service-specific pixels, and secondary CTAs rarely live on the homepage.
mitigation: Check multiple pages (sitemap-guided, minimum 4-5 pages per site).

description: Headless browsers may block CDN requests for tracking pixels (connect.facebook.net, etc.) due to default fingerprinting restrictions.
mitigation: Add HTML fallback detection alongside network interception.
